initial_candidates.sql:
SELECT budget.category, SUM(budget.amount) AS total_approved_value
FROM event
JOIN budget ON event.event_id = budget.link_to_event
JOIN expense ON budget.budget_id = expense.link_to_budget
WHERE event.event_name = 'October Meeting'
  AND expense.approved = 1
GROUP BY budget.category, budget.amount;

SELECT budget.category, SUM(expense.cost) AS total_approved_value
FROM event
JOIN budget ON event.event_id = budget.link_to_event
JOIN expense ON budget.budget_id = expense.link_to_budget
WHERE event.event_name = 'October Meeting'
  AND expense.approved = 1
GROUP BY budget.category, budget.amount;
